current.preorder_conf_body: The items below are PRE-ORDERS. Please note orders will not be shipped until ALL ITEMS in the order are ready to ship. Estimated shipping dates can be found in the product's description.
current.shipping_status_text:
Please see our expected shipping dates below:

Shipping expected 1 week from purchase.

You will receive tracking via automated email at the time of shipment. Please note that orders will ship only when all items in the order are prepared for shipment.
